subject: Cutting [Portfolio Co]'s onboarding time in half — doing the same for [Market]
body:
Hi [Partner Name],

Your investment in [Portfolio Company] showed you understand the friction enterprise teams face with [relevant pain point] — we're tackling the same root cause in [Target Market].

[Company Name] is a [one-line product description] that [key outcome]. We've landed [X] design partners in the past [Y] weeks, including [recognizable company type], who cut [specific metric] by [%] in their first sprint. The market is [size], and no incumbent is moving fast enough to catch us.

Would you have 20 minutes this week for a quick call, or happy to send the deck first if easier?

Best,
[Founder Name]
[Company Name] | Pre-seed | [Traction metric]

subject: Post-[Regulation] compliance is a $[X]B unlock — here's how we're capturing it
body:
Hi [Partner Name],

Seeing [Portfolio Company] navigate [regulatory challenge] told me you're comfortable investing in FinTech infrastructure that turns compliance into a moat — that's exactly what [Company Name] is building.

We automate [compliance workflow] for [customer type], replacing a process that today costs teams [time/cost] per [period]. Since launching six months ago we've signed [X] paying customers with [MRR/ARR], zero churn, and a 14-day sales cycle. The total addressable market is [$XB] and regulation is forcing every [customer type] to act by [deadline].

I'd love to show you a 10-minute live demo — are you free any time this week?

Best,
[Founder Name]
[Company Name] | Seed | $[MRR] MRR, [X] customers

subject: Why [Company Name]'s [core tech] outperforms GPT-4 on [specific task] by [X]%
body:
Hi [Partner Name],

Your thesis around [AI/ML focus from portfolio] resonates with us — we're building in the same layer of the stack but attacking the [specific bottleneck] that's still unsolved.

[Company Name] has developed [proprietary approach] that achieves [benchmark result] on [task], [X]% better than [existing solution], at [Y]x lower inference cost. We're not wrapping an LLM — our architecture [key differentiator]. Early adopters include [customer type], who saw [outcome metric] within [timeframe]. We're raising $[X]M to reach [milestone].

Could we share a 15-minute technical walkthrough? I think the approach will surprise you.

Best,
[Founder Name]
[Company Name] | Seed | [X] customers, $[ARR] ARR

subject: [Company Name] just published [outcome] data — here's why payers are paying attention
body:
Hi [Partner Name],

Your investment in [Portfolio Company] shows you understand that real HealthTech exits require both clinical evidence and a reimbursement pathway — we've built both.

[Company Name] [product description] for [patient population]. Our 12-month study across [X] sites showed [primary outcome] with statistical significance (p<[value]), and [Payer Name] just issued a Category III CPT code covering our protocol, effective [date]. We're at $[ARR] ARR, growing [X]% month-over-month, with [X] health system contracts signed. We're raising $[X]M Series A to scale the commercial team and pursue Category I status.

Would you have 30 minutes for a call? Happy to share the clinical data and payer correspondence ahead of time.

Best,
[Founder Name]
[Company Name] | Series A | $[ARR] ARR, [X] health system partners

subject: [X]% D30 retention and zero paid acquisition — how [Company Name] grows itself
body:
Hi [Partner Name],

Watching [Portfolio Company] crack organic growth in [category] convinced me your fund gets that the best consumer businesses are built on loops, not campaigns — [Company Name] is that kind of business.

We built [product description] for [user persona]. Users share on average [X] times in their first week, which drives [Y]% of new signups with zero paid spend. Our D30 retention is [Z]%, well above the [benchmark]% category average. We crossed [X] MAU in [timeframe] and are monetizing through [model] at $[ARPU] per user. We're raising $[X]M to expand to [next channel/market].

I'd love 20 minutes to walk you through the retention and virality data — are you available this week?

Best,
[Founder Name]
[Company Name] | Pre-seed | [X] MAU, [D30]% D30 retention
